title: PikPak Enhancement Master
trash_notice: Files in Trash will be deleted after 15 days
history_notice: Only records progress generated within the script environment
msg_logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
msg_upload_dup_confirm: Found {n} files with the same name and size, skip them?
tip_up_pause_desc: Includes manually paused and error tasks
ph_cloud_links:
Supported links:
- Magnet, HTTP, FTP, etc.
- YouTube, X (Twitter), TikTok, Facebook, etc.
Add multiple links by starting a new line.
tip_cloud_save_path: Standard cloud downloads are saved in the My Pack folder. Downloads from other apps are saved to the My [XYZ] folder, where [XYZ] is the app name.
lbl_smart_fix: Auto-fix masked magnets (Extract hash / Remove text noise)
msg_save_snapshot_desc: This link can only be saved as a Web Snapshot.
tip_snapshot_details: PikPak cannot extract media from this link directly. It will save the complete web content as a snapshot file instead.
share_copy_suffix: Copy this content and open the PikPak app to watch instantly.
tip_migrate: Pack selected items and prepare migration to a new account [Alt] + [M]
msg_migrate_confirm:
Are you sure you want to migrate the {n} selected items to another account?

After packing, you will be logged out automatically.
Log in to the [Target Account] to complete the transfer.
msg_migrate_ready:
✅ Migration package ready!

You will be logged out shortly. Please log in to your [Target Account].
The system will automatically take over the transfer after re-login.
(Note: The migration package will expire in 1 day)
err_migrate_ban:
Packing failed: Selected items contain restricted or policy-violating content.
Please remove violating files and try again.
msg_migrate_detect:
📦 A migration package from another account has been detected!

It contains {n} items.
After accepting, the data will be saved to:
Home / Pack From Shared
If this folder does not exist, it will be created automatically.

Would you like to start the migration now?
Choose “Yes” to proceed with the migration, or “No” to cancel it.
msg_migrate_same_account: Migration cancelled: You are still logged into the original account. Stub cleared.
msg_migrate_saving: Transferring data at high speed via encrypted channel...
msg_migrate_success:
🎉 Cross-account migration complete!
All files have been successfully transferred to the current account.

tip_export: Generate and download the file tree of the current path
lbl_export_current: Export directory structure for all items in the current path
lbl_analyze_selected: Execute Folder Perspective on {n} selected items

lbl_ana_sim_selected: Execute Folder Deduplication on {n} selected items
lbl_ana_sim_current: Execute Folder Deduplication on all items in the current path
algo_help_content:
Name Match: Finds folder groups with similar names and sizes.
Similarity Match: Finds folder groups with highly overlapping internal files.
Containment Match: Finds subset redundancies where small folder content is fully covered by a large folder.

Accuracy: Similarity > Containment > Name
Scope: Containment > Similarity
tip_bl_desc: Blacklisted items only removed via 'Run Cleanup Now'.
ph_bl_folder: Paste or use right-click menu to add folders.
ph_bl_file: Paste or use right-click menu to add files.
tip_jav_mode_desc: ✨ Smartly extract FC2 and remove irrelevant characters
tip_ad_remove_desc: 🧹 Removes ads, URLs, junk symbols, cleans Emojis, and fixes bracket formats.
tip_ext_fix_desc: 🧩 Corrects extensions based on actual file type (MIME).
tip_ext: Play with PotPlayer or get stream link [Alt] + [E]
ph_sub_search: Type keywords, links will update below...
desc_sort_indep: Sorting changes only apply to the current folder.

desc_view_global: All folders use the same list/grid view.
desc_comic_mode: Default A-Z sorting for Image/Video only folders.

help_desc:
✨ Experience & Navigation Engine
• Interaction Overhaul: Built on top of the official features, the interface is deeply redesigned around Windows File Explorer logic, with support for one-click switching between List View / Grid View.
• Turbo Mode: Once enabled, it takes over native logic and effectively solves lag and crashes in large-scale file scenarios.
• Advanced Path Bar: Supports mouse-wheel scrolling and same-level switching and positioning through the dropdown menu. Full-disk search and analysis suites are all integrated with the path bar, including path echo and source tracing jumps.
• UX Enhancements: Supports multi-dimensional sorting such as starred and type, one-click cover blur, dark theme switching, and silent view refreshing via the SWR strategy to minimize flicker and interruptions.
• Background Indexing & Protection: The flashing blue dot on the home page means full-disk indexing is in progress. A built-in physical lock for concurrent operations actively blocks conflicting actions and reduces dirty data and accidental operations.
* Note: The default folder (My Pack) is protected by design to prevent accidental deletion, copying, moving, or renaming.
📂 Batch & Space Management
• Batch Rename: Supports regex replace/delete, episode numbering, text formatting, clean FC2 naming, ad-prefix removal, and extension repair based on MIME type.
• Analysis Suite: File Analysis combines filtering and deduplication (hash/duration/name, three modes); Folder Analysis combines filtering and deduplication (name/similarity/inclusion rate, three modes); and supports exporting the current folder’s tree-style list.
• Smart Cleanup: Supports permanent deletion (skip trash), one-click empty-folder cleanup, and batch extraction with automatic password memory and smart autofill, including skipping and deleting already extracted items.
• Resource Manager: Use custom file blacklists to clean junk resources with one click, or use them as file whitelists to protect files automatically during batch deletion.
* Note: To avoid sync conflicts, do not modify the same batch of files from other clients while processing is in progress.
🌐 Transfer & Sharing Center
• Share Management: Supports setting an extraction limit. Once the limit is reached, the link is automatically disabled and sharing is canceled.
• Turbo Upload: Supports dragging local files / folders directly onto the webpage for upload, breaking some official interaction limits and significantly reducing interruption rates for large numbers of small files.
• Upload Residue Cleanup: The script tries to clean up leftover cloud-side “ghost files” after abnormal exits or interrupted uploads, reducing directory pollution and duplicate placeholders.
• Enhanced Cloud Download: Batch offline links support automatic deduplication; a built-in smart magnet cleanup engine automatically extracts Base32 / Hex hashes to remove polluted characters; supports parsing .torrent files and provides a webpage snapshot fallback for restricted links.
* Note: Extraction-limit interception only works while the webpage remains open and the device is not asleep.
🎬 Immersive Media Enhancements
• Playback Engine: Supports 0.5x-3.0x speed, rotate/flip, aspect ratio switching, picture-in-picture, restart from beginning, previous/next episode, intro/outro skipping, and enhanced controls such as playlist loop / single loop / pause after playback.
• Compatibility Fallback: Built-in compatibility mode and quality fallback logic can automatically switch to a playable quality when encountering a black screen, unavailable current quality, or codec compatibility issues.
• Subtitle System: Supports three subtitle sources: cloud subtitles, local subtitle files, and online subtitle search; also supports subtitle toggle, position switching, transparent background, size adjustment, and millisecond-level timeline offset.
• External Direct Link: Supports one-click launching of PotPlayer for external playback, or directly exporting and copying the current video stream link.
• Visual Assistance: Supports image search by image on images or the current video frame to quickly trace covers, actors, anime, or source materials.
* Note: Playback history continuously records playback progress generated within the script environment.
⚙️ Configuration & Data Management
• Config Backup: Supports exporting preferences, management rules, password vault data, and more as JSON backup files with digital fingerprints; importing supports smart merge deduplication to avoid repeated overwrites.
• Data Cleanup: Supports on-demand cleanup of full-disk index, preferences, management rules, password vault, and cache to free local storage and improve privacy protection.
• Password Vault: Built-in centralized management for common extraction passwords, allowing automatic use and quick autofill during batch extraction.
• Data Migration: Supports encrypted packaging of selected items. With the automatic takeover mechanism, items can be recognized and transferred directly after logging into another account, enabling seamless cross-account data migration.
* Note: The full-disk index is cleared when the webpage is closed, while preferences, management rules, password vault data, and similar data remain persistent.
⚡ Download & Distribution
• External Download: Supports one-click pushing files to download nodes such as Aria2 / Motrix through the RPC protocol, with real-time connection status detection.
• Directory Structure Restoration: When pushing an entire folder through RPC, the tree-style directory structure in the cloud can be restored automatically, avoiding the mess caused by flattening.
• Distribution Enhancements: Supports long-connection monitoring, automatic export of error lists after failures, and folder download filtering for fine-grained large-scale task distribution.
This project strictly follows the CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 license and must not be used for any commercial purpose
`
